titles.text: Mobile Suit Gundam Gihren's Greed: Blood of Zeon
機動戦士ガンダム ギレンの野望 ジオンの系譜
Kidou Senshi Gundam: Gihren no Yabou - Zeon no Keifu
Kidou Senshi Gundam: Gihren no Yabou - Zeon no Keifu

descriptions.text: Blood of Zeon features a more complex political system compared to the original Gihren's Greed. The player can now create ceasefires and treaties, and the military system now supports mobile suit upgrading and customization. The map system was also updated. Blood of Zeon also introduces mobile suits and characters from various Gundam OVAs, along with the third-party factions Titan, A.E.U.G, and the Axis.
